programme.desc: At Thanksgiving dinner, Wilson announces that he is moving away.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: The man who first recognized Tim's need for "more power" pays his former high-school student a visit.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) almost spoils Tim's (Tim Allen) chance at getting his hot rod featured in a major magazine.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim enlists the help of his brother to build his Christmas display; Jill tries to help her visiting parents.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, when it comes to showing affection, Bob and Abishola have to find a way to meet each other in the middle.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: Bob and Abishola are at odds over whether Dele is ready to get behind the wheel and decide to take matters into their own hands; Christina offers Douglas some work advice only to watch him claim her ideas as his own.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl's doctor puts sex off-limits until the time is right for conception; Jim eats crow to win a huge account from a blowhard potential client (Tom Arnold).

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: When Jim gets into an accident with a department store Santa, an altercation ensues that leaves his on-looking kids fearing Santa will not bring them any gifts.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike learns that Mandy and Kyle's wedding shower is on the same day as the big Broncos-Chargers game; Ryan offers to host the men's party at his place; Ed insists that abiding by his superstitious rituals is the only way the Broncos will win.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mandy starts vaping, to her parents' disappointment; Vanessa commiserates with a fellow teacher about the impending strike; Ryan and Kristin find a secret safe in the basement.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike wants to give Boyd a shotgun for his 10th birthday, but Ryan is against the idea; Kyle and Mandy continue their wedding plans.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike decides that everyone in the family should dress up like each other for the annual Halloween party, hoping to turn everyone against the holiday.

programme.title: Grounded for Life
programme.desc: Sean accidentally outs a gay co-worker (guest star Sean O'Bryan) after seeing him at Action Mountain's "gay day"; Eddie brings a date (guest star Natasha Lyonne) to dinner at Sean and Claudia's place.

programme.title: Grounded for Life
programme.desc: Eddie offers to baby-sit the boys after Claudia and Sean win a free weekend in Atlantic City, but when they get home they find them locked in the basement.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: After Jim makes a neighbor cry with a blunt remark at his backyard barbecue, Jim decides to reform and become the model of polite diplomacy.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl urges Jim to behave on St. Patrick's Day and forgo his annual law-bending "Green Man" routine so she can assure herself an appointment to the church committee.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Andy starts to play chess with Ryan on a regular basis, and jealous Jim assumes Andy is no longer his best friend.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim advises Ryan (Mitch Rouse) on how to deal with fluctuating hormones when he announces that Dana is expecting.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill takes matters into her own hands after Tim begins ignoring the household repairs to tinker with his hot rod.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim competes against Bob Vila in a lawn mower race for charity.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) is overcome with the desire to have another child. Tim Allen stars.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.sub-title: Aisle See You in My Dreams
programme.desc: Al (Richard Karn) takes his latest romance a little too seriously. Sherry Hursey guest stars. With Tim Allen.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike's offer to help Jen with her school's bake sale goes up in smoke; Kyle finds unlikely advice from Joe on where he should enroll in college.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike plays cupid for Joe when he sets him up on a date with Cece; Kyle is jealous when Ryan invites Jen to be a guest on their podcast.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: When Mandy worries about Kyle passing his first college exam, she secretly enlists Vanessa, Jen and Ryan to help tutor him; Mike learns of Ed and Chuck's superstition involving their decision-making.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike finds out that Ed is skipping Outdoor Man's annual bass festival in favor of Bonnie's fancy art gala; Mandy takes over festival planning for Kristin, and things don't go as planned.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Red tries to convince Eric to shoot a deer on a hunting trip; Kitty plays a game of poker with the girls.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric accuses Hyde of stealing his stash of money; Kelso and Fez help Jackie prepare for a beauty pageant.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Eric grows flustered while watching an R-rated "Annie Hall" with his mother; Jackie is jealous of Fez's girlfriend.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Red applies for a supervisor position at a new supermarket but is offered a clerk job; Laurie blackmails Kelso.

programme.title: Grounded for Life
programme.desc: Claudia attempts to smooth relations between the families by having the O'Keefes over for dinner; Sean sets dating boundaries for Lily.

programme.title: Grounded for Life
programme.sub-title: I Just Paid to Say I Love You
programme.desc: Lily accidentally swallows a fly while dining with Brad; a stray cat wreaks havoc inside the house.

programme.title: Washington Week With The Atlantic
programme.desc: A panel of journalists provides reporting and analysis of the major stories emanating from the United States capital.

programme.title: Firing Line With Margaret Hoover
programme.desc: Constitutional scholar Melissa Murray explains why every American should read the Constitution and what Supreme Court decisions reveal about the future of American democracy.

programme.title: American Experience
programme.desc: President George H.W. Bush's childhood, early career in Texas and rise in the Republican Party.

programme.title: Rivers of Life
programme.desc: The Nile, the world's longest river, provides a lifeline for Africa's elephants and leopards, extreme kayakers and ancient wonders.

programme.title: Rivers of Life
programme.desc: Some of the Amazon's secrets include boiling streams, crystal clear lagoons, pink river dolphins and a strange new reef.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.sub-title: Crystal Bridges Museum of American Art Hour 1
programme.desc: A 1976 Marvel UK Super Spider-Man #175 cover art; a 1926 Rogers Hornsby sterling trophy; Winslow Homer watercolors circa 1879.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: The Neighborhood characters are afraid of a dinosaur; they are relieved to discover that it is only a Purple Panda in a costume; Lady Elaine learns that jokes should not hurt other people.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Girl With the Long Face; The Substitute Arthur
programme.desc: Buster Baxter is determined to find out why Fern feels low; Buster searches for a new best friend while Arthur is away.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Search for the endangered orangutan in Borneo.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The Hunters try to help an injured bird so it can join its friends migrating south for the winter.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.desc: Lyla asks customers for their leftover pumpkins, but then gets way too many; Lyla and Luke put their sisters, Liana and Louisa, through a babysitting test.
